name: Entire Agreement
text: This Agreement, together with all schedules and annexures attached hereto, constitutes the entire agreement between the Parties with respect to its subject matter and supersedes all prior negotiations, representations, warranties, and understandings of whatsoever nature between the Parties, whether oral or in writing.

legal_basis.note: Parol evidence rule — oral agreement cannot vary written contract
Fraud — cannot use entire agreement to exclude fraud claims

title: Entire Agreement
dispute_hotspots: Pre-contractual representations — one party relies on verbal promises
Letters of intent — entire agreement clause must address LOI supersession explicitly
